codeReview.summary: Re-reviewed the fixed feature against the prior stale-state failure. `mini/pages/home/index.js` now rebuilds Home from the persisted session before awaiting `loadDigests()`, so an already-mounted Home page immediately enters `authenticated-loading` on refresh or tab return when a session exists. The shared Home state builder still derives signed-in posture from session presence, and it keeps authenticated-loading, authenticated-empty, and authenticated-error copy distinct from signed-out copy. The current diff also extends Mini regression coverage and generated proof for those Home states.

summary: Pass. The prior blocking stale signed-out path is fixed: Home now refreshes from persisted session state immediately, authenticated loading/empty/error states remain distinct from signed-out copy, and I found no new high-confidence blocking or non-blocking issues in the current diff/state for this feature.
